title: Hello, World!
description: Welcome to my blog! This is my first post.

body.raw:
# Welcome to my blog!

This is my first blog post written in MDX. MDX is a powerful format that lets you use React components right in your markdown!

## Features

- **Markdown Support**: Write content in markdown
- **React Components**: Use React components in your posts
- **Code Highlighting**: Share code with syntax highlighting
- **Tags**: Organize posts with tags

Here's a code example:

```typescript
function greet(name: string) {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}

console.log(greet("World"));
```

## What's Next?

I'll be sharing more posts about:
- Web Development
- Programming Tips
- Tech Insights
- And more!
